'status-perfect' : (image.has_fp || image.has_fn ? 'status-warning' : 'status-perfect');\n   224→            return `\n   225→                <div class=\"image-list-item\" data-image-id=\"${image.id}\" tabindex=\"0\" role=\"button\" aria-label=\"${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}\">\n   226→                    <img src=\"${image.thumbnail_path || ''}\" alt=\"${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}\" class=\"thumbnail\" onerror=\"this.src='data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%2260%22 height=%2260%22%3E%3Crect fill=%22%23e2e8f0%22 width=%22100%25%22 height=%22100%25%22/%3E%3Ctext fill=%22%2394a3b8%22 x=%2250%25%22 y=%2250%25%22 text-anchor=%22middle%22 dy=%22.3em%22%3E%3F%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E'\">\n   227→                    <div class=\"image-info\">\n   228→                        <div class=\"filename\">${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}</div>\n   229→                        <div class=\"image-stats\">\n   230→                            GT: ${image.total_gt_boxes} | Pred: ${image.total_pred_boxes}\n   231→                        </div>\n   232→                    </div>\n   233→                    <span class=\"status-dot ${statusClass}\" title=\"${image.is_perfect ? 'Perfect' : (image.has_fp || image.has_fn ? 'Has errors' : 'Good')}\"></span>\n   234→                </div>\n   235→            `;\n   236→        }).join('');\n   237→\n   238→        // Add event listeners to image list items\n   239→        container.querySelectorAll('.image-list-item').forEach(item => {\n   240→            // Click event\n   241→            item.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   242→                const imageId = parseInt(item.getAttribute('data-image-id'));\n   243→                this.selectImage(imageId);\n   244→            });\n   245→\n   246→            // Focus event - update active state\n   247→            item.addEventListener('focus', () => {\n   248→                this.updateActiveStateOnFocus(item);\n   249→            });\n   250→\n   251→            // Keydown event for keyboard navigation\n   252→            item.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\n   253→                this.handleImageListKeydown(e, item);\n   254→            });\n   255→        });\n   256→    }\n   257→\n   258→    updateImagesList(images) {\n   259→        // Store images and apply client-side filters\n   260→        this.allImages = images;\n   261→        this.applyClientSideFilters();\n   262→    }\n   263→\n   264→    updateImagesList(images) {\n   265→        const container = document.getElementById('image-list-container');\n   266→        if (!container) return;\n   267→\n   268→        if (!images || images.length === 0) {\n   269→            container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-muted py-5\">No images found</div>';\n   270→            return;\n   271→        }\n   272→\n   273→        // Store all images for client-side filtering\n   274→        this.allImages = images;\n   275→\n   276→        // Apply client-side search filter (if needed)\n   277→        let filteredImages = images;\n   278→        if (this.filters.search) {\n   279→            const searchTerm = this.filters.search.toLowerCase();\n   280→            filteredImages = images.filter(image =>\n   281→                image.filename.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm)\n   282→            );\n   283→        }\n   284→\n   285→        // Update container with filtered images\n   286→        if (filteredImages.length === 0) {\n   287→            container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-muted py-5\">No images match your search criteria</div>';\n   288→            return;\n   289→        }\n   290→\n   291→        container.innerHTML = filteredImages.map(image => {\n   292→            const statusClass = image.is_perfect ? 'status-perfect' : (image.has_fp || image.has_fn ? 'status-warning' : 'status-perfect');\n   293→            return `\n   294→                <div class=\"image-list-item\" data-image-id=\"${image.id}\" tabindex=\"0\" role=\"button\" aria-label=\"${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}\">\n   295→                    <img src=\"${image.thumbnail_path || ''}\" alt=\"${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}\" class=\"thumbnail\" onerror=\"this.src='data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%2260%22 height=%2260%22%3E%3Crect fill=%22%23e2e8f0%22 width=%22100%25%22 height=%22100%25%22/%3E%3Ctext fill=%22%2394a3b8%22 x=%2250%25%22 y=%2250%25%22 text-anchor=%22middle%22 dy=%22.3em%22%3E%3F%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E'\">\n   296→                    <div class=\"image-info\">\n   297→                        <div class=\"filename\">${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}</div>\n   298→                        <div class=\"image-stats\">\n   299→                            GT: ${image.total_gt_boxes} | Pred: ${image.total_pred_boxes}\n   300→                        </div>\n   301→                    </div>\n   302→                    <span class=\"status-dot ${statusClass}\" title=\"${image.is_perfect ? 'Perfect' : (image.has_fp || image.has_fn ? 'Has errors' : 'Good')}\"></span>\n   303→                </div>\n   304→            `;\n   305→        }).join('');\n   306→\n   307→        // Add event listeners to image list items\n   308→        container.querySelectorAll('.image-list-item').forEach(item => {\n   309→            // Click event\n   310→            item.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   311→                const imageId = parseInt(item.getAttribute('data-image-id'));\n   312→                this.selectImage(imageId);\n   313→            });\n   314→\n   315→            // Focus event - update active state\n   316→            item.addEventListener('focus', () => {\n   317→                this.updateActiveStateOnFocus(item);\n   318→            });\n   319→\n   320→            // Keydown event for keyboard navigation\n   321→            item.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\n   322→                this.handleImageListKeydown(e, item);\n   323→            });\n   324→        });\n   325→    }\n   326→\n   327→    async selectImage(imageId) {\n   328→        if (!this.datasetId) return;\n   329→\n   330→        this.currentImageId = imageId;\n   331→\n   332→        // Update active state in list\n   333→        document.querySelectorAll('.image-list-item').forEach(item => {\n   334→            item.classList.remove('active');\n   335→            if (parseInt(item.getAttribute('data-image-id')) === imageId) {\n   336→                item.classList.add('active');\n   337→            }\n   338→        });\n   339→\n   340→        // Load image details\n   341→        await this.loadImageDetail(imageId);\n   342→    }\n   343→\n   344→    updateActiveStateOnFocus(item) {\n   345→        // Remove active state from all items\n   346→        document.querySelectorAll('.image-list-item').forEach(el => {\n   347→            el.classList.remove('active');\n   348→        });\n   349→        // Add active state to focused item\n   350→        item.classList.add('active');\n   351→    }\n   352→\n   353→    handleImageListKeydown(e, currentItem) {\n   354→        const items = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.image-list-item'));\n   355→        const currentIndex = items.indexOf(currentItem);\n   356→\n   357→        switch (e.key) {\n   358→            case 'Enter':\n   359→            case ' ':\n   360→                // Select the currently focused image\n   361→                e.preventDefault();\n   362→                const imageId = parseInt(currentItem.getAttribute('data-image-id'));\n   363→                this.selectImage(imageId);\n   364→                break;\n   365→\n   366→            case 'ArrowDown':\n   367→                // Move to next item\n   368→                e.preventDefault();\n   369→                if (currentIndex < items.length - 1) {\n   370→                    items[currentIndex + 1].focus();\n   371→                }\n   372→                break;\n   373→\n   374→            case 'ArrowUp':\n   375→                // Move to previous item\n   376→                e.preventDefault();\n   377→                if (currentIndex > 0) {\n   378→                    items[currentIndex - 1].focus();\n   379→                }\n   380→                break;\n   381→\n   382→            case 'ArrowRight':\n   383→            case 'ArrowLeft':\n   384→                // Allow arrow keys to navigate between images when image view is focused\n   385→                // Only if image is already selected\n   386→                if (this.currentImageId && currentIndex !== -1) {\n   387→                    e.preventDefault();\n   388→                    const direction = e.key === 'ArrowRight' ? 1 : -1;\n   389→                    this.navigateImage(direction);\n   390→                }\n   391→                break;\n   392→        }\n   393→    }\n   394→\n   395→    async loadImageDetail(imageId) {\n   396→        if (!this.datasetId) return;\n   397→\n   398→        const detailContent = document.getElementById('image-detail-content');\n   399→        if (detailContent) {\n   400→            detailContent.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center py-5\"><i class=\"fas fa-spinner fa-spin fa-2x mb-3\"></i><p>Loading image details...</p></div>';\n   401→        }\n   402→\n   403→        try {\n   404→            const response = await fetch(`/api/images/${this.datasetId}/${imageId}`);\n   405→            const data = await response.json();\n   406→\n   407→            if (data.success) {\n   408→                this.updateImageDetail(data);\n   409→            }\n   410→        } catch (error) {\n   411→            console.error('Error loading image detail:', error);\n   412→            if (detailContent) {\n   413→                detailContent.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-danger py-5\">Failed to load image details</div>';\n   414→            }\n   415→        }\n   416→    }\n   417→\n   418→    updateImageDetail(data) {\n   419→        const detailContent = document.getElementById('image-detail-content');\n   420→        if (!detailContent) return;\n   421→\n   422→        // Calculate total boxes\n   423→        const totalGT = data.ground_truth_boxes ? data.ground_truth_boxes.length : 0;\n   424→        const totalPred = data.prediction_boxes ? data.prediction_boxes.length : 0;\n   425→\n   426→        // Build per-class stats table rows\n   427→        const classStatsRows = Object.entries(data.per_class_stats || {}).map(([className, stats]) => `\n   428→            <tr>\n   429→                <td>${this.escapeHtml(className)}</td>\n   430→                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.gt_count || 0}</td>\n   431→                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.pred_count || 0}</td>\n   432→                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.tp || 0}</td>\n   433→                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.fp || 0}</td>\n   434→                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.fn || 0}</td>\n   435→            </tr>\n   436→        `).join('');\n   437→\n   438→        detailContent.innerHTML = `\n   439→            <div class=\"image-header-section\">\n   440→                <div class=\"d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3\">\n   441→                    <div>\n   442→                        <h5 class=\"mb-1\"><i class=\"fas fa-image me-2\"></i>${this.escapeHtml(data.filename)}</h5>\n   443→                        <p class=\"mb-0 text-muted\">\n   444→                            <small>${data.dimensions ? `${data.dimensions.width} x ${data.dimensions.height} pixels` : ''}</small>\n   445→                        </p>\n   446→                    </div>\n   447→                    <div class=\"d-flex gap-2\">\n   448→                        <button class=\"btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm\" id=\"prev-image-btn\">\n   449→                            <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-left me-1\"></i> Previous\n   450→                        </button>\n   451→                        <button class=\"btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm\" id=\"next-image-btn\">\n   452→                            Next <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-right ms-1\"></i>\n   453→                        </button>\n   454→                    </div>\n   455→                </div>\n   456→                <div class=\"d-flex gap-3\">\n   457→                    <span class=\"badge bg-primary\">GT: ${totalGT}</span>\n   458→                    <span class=\"badge bg-info\">Pred: ${totalPred}</span>\n   459→                </div>\n   460→\n   461→                <!-- Box Visibility Toggles -->\n   462→                <div class=\"d-flex gap-2 mb-3 mt-3\">\n   463→                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm toggle-btn active\" id=\"toggle-gt-boxes\" title=\"Show/Hide Ground Truth Boxes\">\n   464→                        <i class=\"fas fa-check-square me-1\"></i> GT Boxes\n   465→                    </button>\n   466→                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm toggle-btn active\" id=\"toggle-pred-boxes\" title=\"Show/Hide Prediction Boxes\">\n   467→                        <i class=\"fas fa-crosshairs me-1\"></i> Pred Boxes\n   468→                    </button>\n   469→                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm toggle-btn active\" id=\"toggle-labels\" title=\"Show/Hide Labels\">\n   470→                        <i class=\"fas fa-tag me-1\"></i> Labels\n   471→                    </button>\n   472→                </div>\n   473→\n   474→                <!-- Zoom Controls -->\n   475→                <div class=\"d-flex gap-2 mb-3\">\n   476→                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm zoom-btn\" id=\"zoom-out\" title=\"Zoom Out\">\n   477→                        <i class=\"fas fa-search-minus\"></i>\n   478→                    </button>\n   479→                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm zoom-btn\" id=\"zoom-reset\" title=\"Reset Zoom\">\n   480→                        <span id=\"zoom-level-display\">100%</span>\n   481→                    </button>\n   482→                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm zoom-btn\" id=\"zoom-in\" title=\"Zoom In\">\n   483→                        <i class=\"fas fa-search-plus\"></i>\n   484→                    </button>\n   485→                </div>\n   486→            </div>\n   487→\n   488→            <div class=\"image-display-section\">\n   489→                <div class=\"card\">\n   490→                    <div class=\"card-body p-0\">\n   491→                        <div class=\"canvas-container\" id=\"canvas-container\">\n   492→                            <canvas id=\"image-canvas\"></canvas>\n   493→                        </div>\n   494→                    </div>\n   495→                </div>\n   496→            </div>\n   497→\n   498→            <div class=\"image-statistics-section\">\n   499→                <div class=\"card\">\n   500→                    <div class=\"card-header\">\n   501→                        <h6 class=\"mb-0\"><i class=\"fas fa-chart-bar me-2\"></i>Per-Image Statistics</h6>\n   502→                    </div>\n   503→                    <div class=\"card-body\">\n   504→                        <div class=\"table-responsive\">\n   505→                            <table class=\"table table-bordered table-striped\">\n   506→                                <thead class=\"table-light\">\n   507→                                    <tr>\n   508→                                        <th>Class</th>\n   509→                                        <th class=\"text-center\">GT</th>\n   510→                                        <th class=\"text-center\">Pred</th>\n   511→                                        <th class=\"text-center\">TP</th>\n   512→                                        <th class=\"text-center\">FP</th>\n   513→                                        <th class=\"text-center\">FN</th>\n   514→                                    </tr>\n   515→                                </thead>\n   516→                                <tbody>\n   517→                                    ${classStatsRows || '<tr><td colspan=\"6\" class=\"text-center text-muted\">No statistics available</td></tr>'}\n   518→                                </tbody>\n   519→                            </table>\n   520→                        </div>\n   521→                    </div>\n   522→                </div>\n   523→            </div>\n   524→        `;\n   525→\n   526→        // Add event listeners for navigation buttons\n   527→        const prevBtn = document.getElementById('prev-image-btn');\n   528→        const nextBtn = document.getElementById('next-image-btn');\n   529→        if (prevBtn) {\n   530→            prevBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.navigateImage(-1));\n   531→        }\n   532→        if (nextBtn) {\n   533→            nextBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.navigateImage(1));\n   534→        }\n   535→\n   536→        // Store current image data for re-rendering\n   537→        this.currentImageData = data;\n   538→\n   539→        // Render image with bounding boxes\n   540→        this.renderImageWithBoundingBoxes(data);\n   541→\n   542→        // Add event listeners for toggle buttons\n   543→        this.setupToggleButtons();\n   544→\n   545→        // Add event listeners for zoom controls\n   546→        this.setupZoomControls();\n   547→\n   548→        // Add event listeners for pan/drag functionality\n   549→        this.setupPanDrag();\n   550→    }\n   551→\n   552→    renderImageWithBoundingBoxes(data) {\n   553→        const canvas = document.getElementById('image-canvas');\n   554→        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n   555→        if (!canvas || !ctx) return;\n   556→\n   557→        // Set canvas dimensions\n   558→        const width = data.dimensions?.width || 800;\n   559→        const height = data.dimensions?.height || 600;\n   560→        canvas.width = width;\n   561→        canvas.height = height;\n   562→\n   563→        // Clear canvas and apply zoom/pan transforms\n   564→        ctx.setTransform(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n   565→        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n   566→\n   567→        // Apply zoom and pan transformations\n   568→        ctx.translate(this.panX, this.panY);\n   569→        ctx.scale(this.zoomLevel, this.zoomLevel);\n   570→\n   571→        // Create a placeholder image (since we don't have actual image files)\n   572→        // In a real implementation, you would load the actual image file\n   573→        this.drawPlaceholderImage(ctx, width, height);\n   574→\n   575→        // Draw bounding boxes\n   576→        const gtBoxes = data.ground_truth_boxes || [];\n   577→        const predBoxes = data.prediction_boxes || [];\n   578→\n   579→        // Combine all boxes for rendering\n   580→        // FN boxes are GT boxes without matching prediction (classification is null)\n   581→        const fnBoxes = gtBoxes.filter(box => box.classification === null);\n   582→        // FP boxes are prediction boxes without matching GT\n   583→        const fpBoxes = predBoxes.filter(box => box.classification === 'fp');\n   584→        // TP boxes are matched predictions (classification is 'tp')\n   585→        const tpBoxes = predBoxes.filter(box => box.classification === 'tp');\n   586→\n   587→        // Draw GT boxes (FN only, since TP are predictions that match GT)\n   588→        if (this.showGTBoxes) {\n   589→            fnBoxes.forEach(box => this.drawBoundingBox(ctx, box, 'fn'));\n   590→        }\n   591→\n   592→        // Draw prediction boxes (FP and TP)\n   593→        if (this.showPredBoxes) {\n   594→            fpBoxes.forEach(box => this.drawBoundingBox(ctx, box, 'fp'));\n   595→            tpBoxes.forEach(box => this.drawBoundingBox(ctx, box, 'tp'));\n   596→        }\n   597→    }\n   598→\n   599→    drawPlaceholderImage(ctx, width, height) {\n   600→        // Draw a gradient background\n   601→        const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, width, height);\n   602→        gradient.addColorStop(0, '#f0f9ff');\n   603→        gradient.addColorStop(1, '#e0f2fe');\n   604→        ctx.fillStyle = gradient;\n   605→        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);\n   606→\n   607→        // Draw some placeholder shapes to simulate an image\n   608→        ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';\n   609→        ctx.lineWidth = 1;\n   610→\n   611→        // Draw a grid\n   612→        for (let x = 0; x < width; x += 50) {\n   613→            ctx.beginPath();\n   614→            ctx.moveTo(x, 0);\n   615→            ctx.lineTo(x, height);\n   616→            ctx.stroke();\n   617→        }\n   618→        for (let y = 0; y < height; y += 50) {\n   619→            ctx.beginPath();\n   620→            ctx.moveTo(0, y);\n   621→            ctx.lineTo(width, y);\n   622→            ctx.stroke();\n   623→        }\n   624→\n   625→        // Draw placeholder text\n   626→        ctx.fillStyle = '#94a3b8';\n   627→        ctx.font = '24px Inter, sans-serif';\n   628→        ctx.textAlign = 'center';\n   629→        ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';\n   630→        ctx.fillText('Image Placeholder', width / 2, height / 2);\n   631→        ctx.font = '14px Inter, sans-serif';\n   632→        ctx.fillText(`${width} x ${height}`, width / 2, height / 2 + 30);\n   633→    }\n   634→\n   635→    drawBoundingBox(ctx, box, type) {\n   636→        const bbox = box.bbox;\n   637→        if (!bbox || bbox.length !== 4) return;\n   638→\n   639→        const [x1, y1, x2, y2] = bbox;\n   640→        const width = x2 - x1;\n   641→        const height = y2 - y1;\n   642→\n   643→        // Set style based on type\n   644→        let color, lineWidth;\n   645→        switch (type) {\n   646→            case 'tp':\n   647→                color = '#22c55e'; // green\n   648→                lineWidth = 2;\n   649→                break;\n   650→            case 'fp':\n   651→                color = '#ef4444'; // red\n   652→                lineWidth = 2;\n   653→                break;\n   654→            case 'fn':\n   655→                color = '#ef4444'; // red\n   656→                lineWidth = 2;\n   657→                break;\n   658→            default:\n   659→                return;\n   660→        }\n   661→\n   662→        // Draw bounding box\n   663→        ctx.strokeStyle = color;\n   664→        ctx.lineWidth = lineWidth;\n   665→\n   666→        if (type === 'fn') {\n   667→            ctx.setLineDash([5, 3]); // Dashed line for FN\n   668→        } else {\n   669→            ctx.setLineDash([]);\n   670→        }\n   671→\n   672→        ctx.strokeRect(x1, y1, width, height);\n   673→        ctx.setLineDash([]); // Reset dash\n   674→\n   675→        // Draw corner indicator (24x24px square at top-left)\n   676→        const indicatorSize = 24;\n   677→        const indicatorX = x1 - 2;\n   678→        const indicatorY = y1 - 12;\n   679→        const centerX = indicatorX + indicatorSize / 2;\n   680→        const centerY = indicatorY + indicatorSize / 2;\n   681→\n   682→        ctx.fillStyle = color;\n   683→        ctx.fillRect(indicatorX, indicatorY, indicatorSize, indicatorSize);\n   684→\n   685→        // Draw icon in the corner indicator using canvas paths instead of text\n   686→        ctx.fillStyle = 'white';\n   687→        ctx.strokeStyle = 'white';\n   688→        ctx.lineWidth = 2;\n   689→\n   690→        if (type === 'tp') {\n   691→            // Draw checkmark (✓)\n   692→            ctx.beginPath();\n   693→            ctx.moveTo(centerX - 4, centerY);\n   694→            ctx.lineTo(centerX, centerY + 4);\n   695→            ctx.lineTo(centerX + 6, centerY - 6);\n   696→            ctx.stroke();\n   697→        } else if (type === 'fp') {\n   698→            // Draw cross (✗)\n   699→            ctx.beginPath();\n   700→            ctx.moveTo(centerX - 4, centerY - 4);\n   701→            ctx.lineTo(centerX + 4, centerY + 4);\n   702→            ctx.moveTo(centerX + 4, centerY - 4);\n   703→            ctx.lineTo(centerX - 4, centerY + 4);\n   704→            ctx.stroke();\n   705→        } else if (type === 'fn') {\n   706→            // Draw dash (—)\n   707→            ctx.beginPath();\n   708→            ctx.moveTo(centerX - 6, centerY);\n   709→            ctx.lineTo(centerX + 6, centerY);\n   710→            ctx.stroke();\n   711→        }\n   712→\n   713→        // Draw label (class name and confidence for predictions)\n   714→        if (this.showLabels) {\n   715→            let labelText = '';\n   716→            if (box.class_name) {\n   717→                labelText = box.class_name;\n   718→            }\n   719→            if (box.confidence !== undefined && box.confidence !== null) {\n   720→                labelText += ` (${box.confidence.toFixed(2)})`;\n   721→            }\n   722→\n   723→            if (labelText) {\n   724→                ctx.font = '11px Inter, sans-serif';\n   725→                const textMetrics = ctx.measureText(labelText);\n   726→                const labelWidth = textMetrics.width + 12;\n   727→                const labelHeight = 20;\n   728→\n   729→                // Draw label background (semi-transparent)\n   730→                ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';\n   731→                ctx.fillRect(x1, y1 + 12, labelWidth, labelHeight);\n   732→\n   733→                // Draw label text\n   734→                ctx.fillStyle = 'white';\n   735→                ctx.textAlign = 'left';\n   736→                ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';\n   737→                ctx.fillText(labelText, x1 + 6, y1 + 22);\n   738→            }\n   739→        }\n   740→    }\n   741→\n   742→    setupToggleButtons() {\n   743→        // GT Boxes toggle\n   744→        const gtToggle = document.getElementById('toggle-gt-boxes');\n   745→        if (gtToggle) {\n   746→            gtToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   747→                this.showGTBoxes = !this.showGTBoxes;\n   748→                gtToggle.classList.toggle('active');\n   749→                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n   750→            });\n   751→        }\n   752→\n   753→        // Prediction Boxes toggle\n   754→        const predToggle = document.getElementById('toggle-pred-boxes');\n   755→        if (predToggle) {\n   756→            predToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   757→                this.showPredBoxes = !this.showPredBoxes;\n   758→                predToggle.classList.toggle('active');\n   759→                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n   760→            });\n   761→        }\n   762→\n   763→        // Labels toggle\n   764→        const labelsToggle = document.getElementById('toggle-labels');\n   765→        if (labelsToggle) {\n   766→            labelsToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   767→                this.showLabels = !this.showLabels;\n   768→                labelsToggle.classList.toggle('active');\n   769→                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n   770→            });\n   771→        }\n   772→    }\n   773→\n   774→    reRenderCurrentImage() {\n   775→        // Re-render the current image with updated visibility settings\n   776→        if (this.currentImageData) {\n   777→            this.renderImageWithBoundingBoxes(this.currentImageData);\n   778→        }\n   779→    }\n   780→\n   781→    setupZoomControls() {\n   782→        // Zoom in button\n   783→        const zoomInBtn = document.getElementById('zoom-in');\n   784→        if (zoomInBtn) {\n   785→            zoomInBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   786→                this.zoomLevel = Math.min(this.zoomLevel + 0.25, 5.0); // Max zoom 5x\n   787→                this.updateZoomLevelDisplay();\n   788→                this.updateCanvasCursor();\n   789→                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n   790→            });\n   791→        }\n   792→\n   793→        // Zoom out button\n   794→        const zoomOutBtn = document.getElementById('zoom-out');\n   795→        if (zoomOutBtn) {\n   796→            zoomOutBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   797→                this.zoomLevel = Math.max(this.zoomLevel - 0.25, 0.25); // Min zoom 0.25x\n   798→                this.updateZoomLevelDisplay();\n   799→                this.updateCanvasCursor();\n   800→                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n   801→            });\n   802→        }\n   803→\n   804→        // Reset zoom button\n   805→        const zoomResetBtn = document.getElementById('zoom-reset');\n   806→        if (zoomResetBtn) {\n   807→            zoomResetBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   808→                this.zoomLevel = 1.0;\n   809→                this.panX = 0;\n   810→                this.panY = 0;\n   811→                this.updateZoomLevelDisplay();\n   812→                this.updateCanvasCursor();\n   813→                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n   814→            });\n   815→        }\n   816→    }\n   817→\n   818→    updateZoomLevelDisplay() {\n   819→        const zoomDisplay = document.getElementById('zoom-level-display');\n   820→        if (zoomDisplay) {\n   821→            zoomDisplay.textContent = `${Math.round(this.zoomLevel * 100)}%`;\n   822→        }\n   823→    }\n   824→\n   825→    setupPanDrag() {\n   826→        const canvas = document.getElementById('image-canvas');\n   827→        const container = document.getElementById('canvas-container');\n   828→        if (!canvas || !container) return;\n   829→\n   830→        // Reset pan on new image load\n   831→        this.panX = 0;\n   832→        this.panY = 0;\n   833→\n   834→        // Update cursor style based on zoom level\n   835→        this.updateCanvasCursor();\n   836→\n   837→        // Mouse down - start dragging\n   838→        canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {\n   839→            if (this.zoomLevel === 1.0) return; // Only allow panning when zoomed\n   840→\n   841→            this.isDragging = true;\n   842→            this.dragStartX = e.clientX;\n   843→            this.dragStartY = e.clientY;\n   844→        });\n   845→\n   846→        // Mouse move - update pan position\n   847→        canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {\n   848→            if (!this.isDragging) return;\n   849→\n   850→            const dx = e.clientX - this.dragStartX;\n   851→            const dy = e.clientY - this.dragStartY;\n   852→\n   853→            this.panX += dx;\n   854→            this.panY += dy;\n   855→\n   856→            this.dragStartX = e.clientX;\n   857→            this.dragStartY = e.clientY;\n   858→\n   859→            this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n   860→        });\n   861→\n   862→        // Mouse up - stop dragging\n   863→        canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {\n   864→            this.isDragging = false;\n   865→        });\n   866→\n   867→        // Mouse leave - stop dragging\n   868→        canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {\n   869→            this.isDragging = false;\n   870→        });\n   871→    }\n   872→\n   873→    updateCanvasCursor() {\n   874→        const canvas = document.getElementById('image-canvas');\n   875→        if (!canvas) return;\n   876→\n   877→        if (this.zoomLevel === 1.0) {\n   878→            canvas.classList.remove('zoomed');\n   879→        } else {\n   880→            canvas.classList.add('zoomed');\n   881→        }\n   882→    }\n   883→\n   884→    navigateImage(direction) {\n   885→        const items = document.querySelectorAll('.image-list-item');\n   886→        if (items.length === 0) return;\n   887→\n   888→        let currentIndex = -1;\n   889→        items.forEach((item, index) => {\n   890→            if (item.classList.contains('active')) {\n   891→                currentIndex = index;\n   892→            }\n   893→        });\n   894→\n   895→        if (currentIndex === -1) return;\n   896→\n   897→        let newIndex = currentIndex + direction;\n   898→        if (newIndex < 0) newIndex = items.length - 1;\n   899→        if (newIndex >= items.length) newIndex = 0;\n   900→\n   901→        const newImageId = parseInt(items[newIndex].getAttribute('data-image-id'));\n   902→        this.selectImage(newImageId);\n   903→    }\n   904→\n   905→    setupEventListeners() {\n   906→        // Load dataset button (navbar)\n   907→        const loadDatasetBtn = document.getElementById('btn-load-dataset');\n   908→        if (loadDatasetBtn) {\n   909→            loadDatasetBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.showLoadDatasetModal());\n   910→        }\n   911→\n   912→        // Load dataset button (empty state)\n   913→        const emptyLoadDatasetBtn = document.getElementById('empty-load-dataset');\n   914→        if (emptyLoadDatasetBtn) {\n   915→            emptyLoadDatasetBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.showLoadDatasetModal());\n   916→        }\n   917→\n   918→        // Load dataset button (comparison view)\n   919→        const comparisonLoadDatasetBtn = document.getElementById('comparison-load-dataset');\n   920→        if (comparisonLoadDatasetBtn) {\n   921→            comparisonLoadDatasetBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.showLoadDatasetModal());\n   922→        }\n   923→\n   924→        // IoU threshold slider\n   925→        const iouSlider = document.getElementById('iou-threshold');\n   926→        if (iouSlider) {\n   927→            iouSlider.addEventListener('input', (e) => {\n   928→                this.iouThreshold = parseFloat(e.target.value);\n   929→                document.getElementById('iou-threshold-value').textContent = this.iouThreshold.toFixed(1);\n   930→                this.updateSliderTrackFill(iouSlider);\n   931→            });\n   932→            iouSlider.addEventListener('change', () => {\n   933→                this.recalculateStatistics();\n   934→            });\n   935→        }\n   936→\n   937→        // Confidence threshold slider\n   938→        const confidenceSlider = document.getElementById('confidence-threshold');\n   939→        if (confidenceSlider) {\n   940→            confidenceSlider.addEventListener('input', (e) => {\n   941→                this.confidenceThreshold = parseFloat(e.target.value);\n   942→                document.getElementById('confidence-threshold-value').textContent = this.confidenceThreshold.toFixed(2);\n   943→                this.updateSliderTrackFill(confidenceSlider);\n   944→            });\n   945→            confidenceSlider.addEventListener('change', () => {\n   946→                this.recalculateStatistics();\n   947→            });\n   948→        }\n   949→\n   950→        // Class search input (for metrics table)\n   951→        const classSearch = document.getElementById('class-search');\n   952→        if (classSearch) {\n   953→            classSearch.addEventListener('input', (e) => {\n   954→                this.filterMetricsTable(e.target.value);\n   955→            });\n   956→        }\n   957→\n   958→        // Image list search input\n   959→        const imageSearch = document.getElementById('image-search');\n   960→        if (imageSearch) {\n   961→            imageSearch.addEventListener('input', (e) => {\n   962→                this.filters.search = e.target.value;\n   963→                // Apply client-side filtering for search\n   964→                this.applyClientSideFilters();\n   965→            });\n   966→        }\n   967→\n   968→        // Class filter dropdown\n   969→        const classFilter = document.getElementById('class-filter');\n   970→        if (classFilter) {\n   971→            classFilter.addEventListener('change', (e) => {\n   972→                this.filters.classFilter = e.target.value;\n   973→                // Reload images with new class filter\n   974→                this.loadImagesList();\n   975→            });\n   976→        }\n   977→\n   978→        // Status filter dropdown\n   979→        const statusFilter = document.getElementById('status-filter');\n   980→        if (statusFilter) {\n   981→            statusFilter.addEventListener('change', (e) => {\n   982→                this.filters.statusFilter = e.target.value;\n   983→                // Reload images with new status filter\n   984→                this.loadImagesList();\n   985→            });\n   986→        }\n   987→\n   988→        // Setup sortable table headers\n   989→        this.setupSortableTableHeaders();\n   990→\n   991→        // Export buttons\n   992→        const exportCsvBtn = document.getElementById('export-csv');\n   993→        if (exportCsvBtn) {\n   994→            exportCsvBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.exportStatistics('csv'));\n   995→        }\n   996→\n   997→        const exportJsonBtn = document.getElementById('export-json');\n   998→        if (exportJsonBtn) {\n   999→            exportJsonBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.exportStatistics('json'));\n  1000→        }\n  1001→\n  1002→        // Save to window for global access\n  1003→        window.app = this;\n  1004→    }\n  1005→\n  1006→    setupSliderTrackFill() {\n  1007→        // Initialize track fill for all sliders\n  1008→        const sliders = document.querySelectorAll('.form-range');\n  1009→        sliders.forEach(slider => {\n  1010→            this.updateSliderTrackFill(slider);\n  1011→        });\n  1012→    }\n  1013→\n  1014→    setupSortableTableHeaders() {\n  1015→        // Store current sort state\n  1016→        this.currentSort = {\n  1017→            column: null,\n  1018→            direction: 'asc'\n  1019→        };\n  1020→\n  1021→        // Get all sortable headers\n  1022→        const sortableHeaders = document.querySelectorAll('th.sortable');\n  1023→        sortableHeaders.forEach(header => {\n  1024→            header.addEventListener('click', () => {\n  1025→                const sortColumn = header.getAttribute('data-sort');\n  1026→                const sortType = header.getAttribute('data-type');\n  1027→\n  1028→                // Toggle sort direction if clicking same column\n  1029→                if (this.currentSort.column === sortColumn) {\n  1030→                    this.currentSort.direction = this.currentSort.direction === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc';\n  1031→                } else {\n  1032→                    this.currentSort.column = sortColumn;\n  1033→                    this.currentSort.direction = 'asc';\n  1034→                }\n  1035→\n  1036→                // Update sort icons\n  1037→                this.updateSortIcons();\n  1038→\n  1039→                // Sort the table\n  1040→                this.sortMetricsTable(sortColumn, sortType, this.currentSort.direction);\n  1041→            });\n  1042→        });\n  1043→    }\n  1044→\n  1045→    updateSortIcons() {\n  1046→        // Clear all sort icons\n  1047→        const allIcons = document.querySelectorAll('.sort-icon');\n  1048→        allIcons.forEach(icon => {\n  1049→            icon.innerHTML = '';\n  1050→        });\n  1051→\n  1052→        // Set icon for current sort column\n  1053→        if (this.currentSort.column) {\n  1054→            const header = document.querySelector(`th[data-sort=\"${this.currentSort.column}\"]`);\n  1055→            if (header) {\n  1056→                const icon = header.querySelector('.sort-icon');\n  1057→                if (icon) {\n  1058→                    icon.innerHTML = this.currentSort.direction === 'asc' ? '&#9650;' : '&#9660;'; // Up or down arrow\n  1059→                }\n  1060→            }\n  1061→        }\n  1062→    }\n  1063→\n  1064→    sortMetricsTable(column, type, direction) {\n  1065→        const tableBody = document.getElementById('metrics-table-body');\n  1066→        if (!tableBody) return;\n  1067→\n  1068→        const rows = Array.from(tableBody.querySelectorAll('tr'));\n  1069→\n  1070→        // Get column index\n  1071→        const headerIndex = this.getColumnIndex(column);\n  1072→        if (headerIndex === -1) return;\n  1073→\n  1074→        // Sort rows\n  1075→        rows.sort((rowA, rowB) => {\n  1076→            const cellA = rowA.cells[headerIndex];\n  1077→            const cellB = rowB.cells[headerIndex];\n  1078→\n  1079→            if (!cellA || !cellB) return 0;\n  1080→\n  1081→            let valueA, valueB;\n  1082→\n  1083→            if (type === 'string') {\n  1084→                valueA = cellA.textContent.trim().toLowerCase();\n  1085→                valueB = cellB.textContent.trim().toLowerCase();\n  1086→            } else {\n  1087→                // For numeric values, remove formatting and parse\n  1088→                valueA = parseFloat(cellA.textContent.replace(/[^\\d.-]/g, '')) || 0;\n  1089→                valueB = parseFloat(cellB.textContent.replace(/[^\\d.-]/g, '')) || 0;\n  1090→            }\n  1091→\n  1092→            if (valueA < valueB) return direction === 'asc' ? -1 : 1;\n  1093→            if (valueA > valueB) return direction === 'asc' ? 1 : -1;\n  1094→            return 0;\n  1095→        });\n  1096→\n  1097→        // Reorder rows in the table\n  1098→        rows.forEach(row => {\n  1099→            tableBody.appendChild(row);\n  1100→        });\n  1101→    }\n  1102→\n  1103→    getColumnIndex(columnName) {\n  1104→        const headers = document.querySelectorAll('th[data-sort]');\n  1105→        for (let i = 0; i < headers.length; i++) {\n  1106→            if (headers[i].getAttribute('data-sort') === columnName) {\n  1107→                return i;\n  1108→            }\n  1109→        }\n  1110→        return -1;\n  1111→    }\n  1112→\n  1113→    updateSliderTrackFill(slider) {\n  1114→        // Calculate the percentage of the slider value\n  1115→        const min = parseFloat(slider.min) || 0;\n  1116→        const max = parseFloat(slider.max) || 1;\n  1117→        const value = parseFloat(slider.value) || 0;\n  1118→        const percentage = ((value - min) / (max - min)) * 100;\n  1119→\n  1120→        // Update the background gradient for track fill effect\n  1121→        const primaryColor = '#2c5282';\n  1122→        const trackColor = '#e2e8f0';\n  1123→        slider.style.background = `linear-gradient(to right, ${primaryColor} 0%, ${primaryColor} ${percentage}%, ${trackColor} ${percentage}%, ${trackColor} 100%)`;\n  1124→    }\n  1125→\n  1126→    showLoadDatasetModal() {\n  1127→        const modalElement = document.getElementById('loadDatasetModal');\n  1128→        const modal = new bootstrap.Modal(modalElement);\n  1129→        modal.show();\n  1130→\n  1131→        // Handle confirm button\n  1132→        const confirmBtn = document.getElementById('confirm-load-dataset');\n  1133→        if (confirmBtn) {\n  1134→            // Remove old event listener if exists\n  1135→            const newConfirmBtn = confirmBtn.cloneNode(true);\n  1136→            confirmBtn.parentNode.replaceChild(newConfirmBtn, confirmBtn);\n  1137→\n  1138→            newConfirmBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n  1139→                const pathInput = document.getElementById('dataset-path');\n  1140→                const path = pathInput?.value?.trim();\n  1141→\n  1142→                if (!path) {\n  1143→                    this.showError('Please enter a dataset path');\n  1144→                    return;\n  1145→                }\n  1146→\n  1147→                // Hide modal and load dataset\n  1148→                modal.hide();\n  1149→                this.loadDataset(path);\n  1150→            });\n  1151→        }\n  1152→    }\n  1153→\n  1154→    async loadDataset(path) {\n  1155→        try {\n  1156→            this.showLoading();\n  1157→\n  1158→            // Small delay to ensure loading overlay is visible during testing\n  1159→            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));\n  1160→\n  1161→            const response = await fetch('/api/dataset/load', {\n  1162→                method: 'POST',\n  1163→                headers: {\n  1164→                    'Content-Type': 'application/json'\n  1165→                },\n  1166→                body: JSON.stringify({\n  1167→                    dataset_path: path,\n  1168→                    iou_threshold: this.iouThreshold\n  1169→                })\n  1170→            });\n  1171→\n  1172→            const data = await response.json();\n  1173→\n  1174→            if (data.success) {\n  1175→                this.datasetId = data.dataset_id;\n  1176→                window.location.hash = '#dashboard';\n  1177→                await this.loadStatistics();\n  1178→            } else {\n  1179→                // Handle error response with user-friendly message\n  1180→                const errors = data.errors || [];\n  1181→                if (errors.length > 0) {\n  1182→                    // Show the actual error messages from the backend\n  1183→                    this.showError(errors);\n  1184→                } else {\n  1185→                    this.showError('Failed to load dataset: Unknown error');\n  1186→                }\n  1187→            }\n  1188→        } catch (error) {\n  1189→            this.showError('Error loading dataset: ' + error.message);\n  1190→        } finally {\n  1191→            this.hideLoading();\n  1192→        }\n  1193→    }\n  1194→\n  1195→    async loadStatistics() {\n  1196→        try {\n  1197→            const response = await fetch(`/api/statistics/${this.datasetId}`);\n  1198→            const data = await response.json();\n  1199→            this.updateDashboard(data);\n  1200→            // Update dashboard display state\n  1201→            this.showDashboard();\n  1202→        } catch (error) {\n  1203→            this.showError('Error loading statistics');\n  1204→        }\n  1205→    }\n  1206→\n  1207→    updateDashboard(data) {\n  1208→        // Update summary cards\n  1209→        if (data.overall_metrics) {\n  1210→            document.getElementById('summary-total-images').textContent = data.overall_metrics.total_gt_boxes || '-';\n  1211→            document.getElementById('summary-total-classes').textContent = data.classes?.length || '-';\n  1212→            document.getElementById('summary-avg-recall').textContent = data.overall_metrics.recall !== undefined ? data.overall_metrics.recall.toFixed(3) : '-';\n  1213→            document.getElementById('summary-avg-precision').textContent = data.overall_metrics.precision !== undefined ? data.overall_metrics.precision.toFixed(3) : '-';\n  1214→        }\n  1215→\n  1216→        // Update metrics table\n  1217→        this.updateMetricsTable(data.classes || []);\n  1218→\n  1219→        // Update charts\n  1220→        this.updateCharts(data.classes || []);\n  1221→    }\n  1222→\n  1223→    updateMetricsTable(classes) {\n  1224→        const tableBody = document.getElementById('metrics-table-body');\n  1225→        if (!tableBody) return;\n  1226→\n  1227→        if (classes.length === 0) {\n  1228→            tableBody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan=\"10\" class=\"text-center text-muted\">No data available.</td></tr>';\n  1229→            return;\n  1230→        }\n  1231→\n  1232→        tableBody.innerHTML = classes.map(cls => `\n  1233→            <tr>\n  1234→                <td><strong>${this.escapeHtml(cls.name)}</strong></td>\n  1235→                <td>${cls.total_gt_count || 0}</td>\n  1236→                <td>${cls.total_pred_count || 0}</td>\n  1237→                <td>${cls.tp_count || 0}</td>\n  1238→                <td>${cls.fp_count || 0}</td>\n  1239→                <td>${cls.fn_count || 0}</td>\n  1240→                <td>${cls.recall !== undefined ? cls.recall.toFixed(3) : '-'}</td>\n  1241→                <td>${cls.precision !== undefined ? cls.precision.toFixed(3) : '-'}</td>\n  1242→                <td>${cls.fpr !== undefined ? cls.fpr.toFixed(3) : '-'}</td>\n  1243→                <td>${cls.f1_score !== undefined ? cls.f1_score.toFixed(3) : '-'}</td>\n  1244→            </tr>\n  1245→        `).join('');\n  1246→    }\n  1247→\n  1248→    updateCharts(classes) {\n  1249→        if (classes.length === 0) return;\n  1250→\n  1251→        const labels = classes.map(cls => cls.name);\n  1252→        const recallData = classes.map(cls => cls.recall !== undefined ? cls.recall : 0);\n  1253→        const precisionData = classes.map(cls => cls.precision !== undefined ? cls.precision : 0);\n  1254→        const fprData = classes.map(cls => cls.fpr !== undefined ? cls.fpr : 0);\n  1255→\n  1256→        // Generate colors for each class\n  1257→        const colors = this.generateColors(classes.length);\n  1258→\n  1259→        // Update recall chart\n  1260→        this.createOrUpdateChart('recall-chart', 'Recall', labels, recallData, colors);\n  1261→\n  1262→        // Update precision chart\n  1263→        this.createOrUpdateChart('precision-chart', 'Precision', labels, precisionData, colors);\n  1264→\n  1265→        // Update FPR chart\n  1266→        this.createOrUpdateChart('fpr-chart', 'False Positive Rate', labels, fprData, colors);\n  1267→    }\n  1268→\n  1269→    createOrUpdateChart(canvasId, label, labels, data, colors) {\n  1270→        const canvas = document.getElementById(canvasId);\n  1271→        if (!canvas) return;\n  1272→\n  1273→        // Set canvas height explicitly for Chart.js to render properly\n  1274→        canvas.style.height = '300px';\n  1275→        canvas.style.width = '100%';\n  1276→\n  1277→        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n  1278→\n  1279→        // Check if chart already exists and destroy it\n  1280→        if (canvas.chart) {\n  1281→            canvas.chart.destroy();\n  1282→        }\n  1283→\n  1284→        // Create new chart with enhanced tooltip configuration\n  1285→        canvas.chart = new Chart(ctx, {\n  1286→            type: 'bar',\n  1287→            data: {\n  1288→                labels: labels,\n  1289→                datasets: [{\n  1290→                    label: label,\n  1291→                    data: data,\n  1292→                    backgroundColor: colors.map(c => c.background),\n  1293→                    borderColor: colors.map(c => c.border),\n  1294→                    borderWidth: 2\n  1295→                }]\n  1296→            },\n  1297→            options: {\n  1298→                responsive: true,\n  1299→                maintainAspectRatio: false,\n  1300→                scales: {\n  1301→                    y: {\n  1302→                        beginAtZero: true,\n  1303→                        max: 1,\n  1304→                        grid: {\n  1305→                            color: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)'\n  1306→                        }\n  1307→                    },\n  1308→                    x: {\n  1309→                        grid: {\n  1310→                            display: false\n  1311→                        }\n  1312→                    }\n  1313→                },\n  1314→                plugins: {\n  1315→                    legend: {\n  1316→                        display: false\n  1317→                    },\n  1318→                    tooltip: {\n  1319→                        enabled: true,\n  1320→                        backgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8)',\n  1321→                        titleColor: '#fff',\n  1322→                        bodyColor: '#fff',\n  1323→                        borderColor: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)',\n  1324→                        borderWidth: 1,\n  1325→                        padding: 12,\n  1326→                        cornerRadius: 6,\n  1327→                        callbacks: {\n  1328→                            label: function(context) {\n  1329→                                return `${context.dataset.label}: ${context.parsed.y.toFixed(3)}`;\n  1330→                            },\n  1331→                            title: function(context) {\n  1332→                                return context[0].label;\n  1333→                            }\n  1334→                        }\n  1335→                    }\n  1336→                }\n  1337→            }\n  1338→        });\n  1339→    }\n  1340→\n  1341→    generateColors(count) {\n  1342→        const colors = [];\n  1343→        const baseHues = [210, 150, 45, 0, 270, 180, 300, 330, 30, 60]; // Blue, green, orange, red, purple, cyan, magenta, pink, brown, yellow\n  1344→\n  1345→        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n  1346→            const hue = baseHues[i % baseHues.length];\n  1347→            const saturation = 70;\n  1348→            const lightness = 50;\n  1349→            colors.push({\n  1350→                background: `hsla(${hue}, ${saturation}%, ${lightness}%, 0.7)`,\n  1351→                border: `hsla(${hue}, ${saturation}%, ${lightness - 10}%, 1)`\n  1352→            });\n  1353→        }\n  1354→\n  1355→        return colors;\n  1356→    }\n  1357→\n  1358→    escapeHtml(text) {\n  1359→        const div = document.createElement('div');\n  1360→        div.textContent = text;\n  1361→        return div.innerHTML;\n  1362→    }\n  1363→\n  1364→    showLoading() {\n  1365→        const overlay = document.getElementById('loading-overlay') || this.createLoadingOverlay();\n  1366→        overlay.classList.remove('d-none');\n  1367→    }\n  1368→\n  1369→    hideLoading() {\n  1370→        const overlay = document.getElementById('loading-overlay');\n  1371→        if (overlay) {\n  1372→            overlay.classList.add('d-none');\n  1373→        }\n  1374→    }\n  1375→\n  1376→    createLoadingOverlay() {\n  1377→        const overlay = document.createElement('div');\n  1378→        overlay.id = 'loading-overlay';\n  1379→        overlay.className = 'loading-overlay';\n  1380→        overlay.innerHTML = '<div class=\"spinner\"></div>';\n  1381→        document.body.appendChild(overlay);\n  1382→        return overlay;\n  1383→    }\n  1384→\n  1385→    showError(message) {\n    }\n        }\n\n        // Hide dashboard empty state\n        if (dashboardEmptyState) {\n            dashboardEmptyState.style.display = 'none';\n        }\n    }\n\n    async response.json();\n\n            if (data.success && data.classes) {\n                this.allClasses = data.classes;\n                this.updateClassFilterDropdown();\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Error loading classes for filter:', error);\n        }\n    }\n\n    updateClassFilterDropdown() {\n        const classFilter = try {\n            // Build URL with filter parameters (class and status filters are server-side)\n            let url = `/api/images/${this.datasetId}?per_page=50`;\n\n            if (this.filters.classFilter) {\n                url += `&class_filter=${encodeURIComponent(this.filters.classFilter)}`;\n            }\n\n            if (this.filters.statusFilter) {\n                url += `&status_filter=${encodeURIComponent(this.filters.statusFilter)}`;\n            }\n\n            const response = await fetch(url);\n            const data = await response.json();\n\n images list:', error);\n            const container = document.getElementById('image-list-container');\n            if (container) {\n                container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center this.renderImagesList(filteredImages);\n    }\n\n    renderImagesList(images) {\n        const container = document.getElementById('image-list-container');\n        if (!container) return;\n\n        if (!images || images.length === 0) {\n            container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-muted py-5\">No images found</div>';\n            return;\n        }\n\n        container.innerHTML = images.map(image => {\n            const statusClass = image.is_perfect ? 'status-perfect' : (image.has_fp || image.has_fn ? 'status-warning' : 'status-perfect');\n            return `\n                <div class=\"image-list-item\" data-image-id=\"${image.id}\" tabindex=\"0\" role=\"button\" aria-label=\"${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}\">\n                    <img src=\"${image.thumbnail_path || ''}\" alt=\"${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}\" class=\"thumbnail\" onerror=\"this.src='data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%2260%22 height=%2260%22%3E%3Crect fill=%22%23e2e8f0%22 width=%22100%25%22 height=%22100%25%22/%3E%3Ctext fill=%22%2394a3b8%22 x=%2250%25%22 y=%2250%25%22 text-anchor=%22middle%22 dy=%22.3em%22%3E%3F%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E'\">\n                    <div class=\"image-info\">\n                        <div class=\"filename\">${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}</div>\n                        <div class=\"image-stats\">\n                            GT: ${image.total_gt_boxes} | Pred: ${image.total_pred_boxes}\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    <span class=\"status-dot ${statusClass}\" title=\"${image.is_perfect ? item.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\n                this.handleImageListKeydown(e, item);\n            });\n        });\n    }\n\n    async selectImage(imageId) {\n        if (!this.datasetId) item.classList.remove('active');\n            if (parseInt(item.getAttribute('data-image-id')) === imageId) {\n                item.classList.add('active');\n            }\n        });\n\n        // document.querySelectorAll('.image-list-item').forEach(el => {\n            el.classList.remove('active');\n        });\n        // Add active state to focused item\n        item.classList.add('active');\n    }\n\n    handleImageListKeydown(e, currentItem) {\n        const items = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.image-list-item'));\n        const currentIndex = items.indexOf(currentItem);\n\n        switch (e.key) {\n            case 'Enter':\n            case ' ':\n                // Select the currently focused image\n                e.preventDefault();\n                const imageId = parseInt(currentItem.getAttribute('data-image-id'));\n                this.selectImage(imageId);\n                break;\n\n            case 'ArrowDown':\n                // Move to next item\n                e.preventDefault();\n                if (currentIndex < items.length - 1) {\n                    items[currentIndex + 1].focus();\n                }\n                break;\n\n            case 'ArrowUp':\n                // Move to previous item\n                e.preventDefault();\n                if (currentIndex > 0) {\n                    items[currentIndex - 1].focus();\n                }\n                break;\n\n            case 'ArrowRight':\n            case 'ArrowLeft':\n                // Allow arrow keys to navigate between images when image view is focused\n                // Only if image is already selected\n                if (this.currentImageId && currentIndex !== -1) {\n                    e.preventDefault();\n                    const direction = e.key === 'ArrowRight' ? 1 : -1;\n                    this.navigateImage(direction);\n                }\n                break;\n        }\n    }\n\n    async loadImageDetail(imageId) {\n        if (!this.datasetId) return;\n\n        const detailContent = document.getElementById('image-detail-content');\n        if (detailContent) {\n            detailContent.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center py-5\"><i class=\"fas fa-spinner fa-spin fa-2x mb-3\"></i><p>Loading image details...</p></div>';\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const response = await fetch(`/api/images/${this.datasetId}/${imageId}`);\n            const data = await response.json();\n\n            if (data.success) {\n                this.updateImageDetail(data);\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Error loading image detail:', error);\n            if (detailContent) {\n                detailContent.innerHTML = '<div            <button class=\"btn btn-sm toggle-btn active\" id=\"toggle-gt-boxes\" title=\"Show/Hide Ground Truth Boxes\">\n                        <i class=\"fas fa-check-square me-1\"></i> GT Boxes\n                   ${classStatsRows || '<tr><td colspan=\"6\" class=\"text-center text-muted\">No statistics available</td></tr>'}\n                                </tbody>\n                            </table>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        `;\n\n        // Add event listeners for navigation buttons\n        const
